notes: Added 3 new parents (nails, body, oral-care, baby) and 10 new leaves to accommodate specific product types like nail art, body oils, and pedicure tools, while grouping hair extensions and styling tools logically.

Assigned products to existing leaves; 5 products (religious headwear, eyeshadow, magnetic lashes, nipple covers, coin snaps) assigned to unclassified as they do not fit current taxonomy.
